# header

The `header` package generates metadata comment blocks for `.env` files produced by vaultpull.

## Usage

```go
opts := header.Options{
    Source:    "secret/myapp",
    Timestamp: true,
    Warning:   true,
}

w := header.New(opts)
w.Write(os.Stdout)
// # This file is generated by vaultpull. Do not edit manually.
// # Source: secret/myapp
// # Generated: 2024-06-01T12:00:00Z
```

## Options

| Field       | Type   | Description                              |
|-------------|--------|------------------------------------------|
| `Source`    | string | Vault path the secrets were read from    |
| `Timestamp` | bool   | Include generation timestamp             |
| `Warning`   | bool   | Include "do not edit" warning comment    |

Use `DefaultOptions()` for sensible defaults (Timestamp and Warning enabled).
